reviews.comment:
Excelente ubicación a la vera de la ruta 2 de camino a Buenos Aires. La atención Premium!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location right off Route 2 on the way to Buenos Aires. Premium service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCdk8yZUpREAE

reviews.comment:
La atención agradable que tienen en general en todas las estaciones ACA la confiteria clásica con mozos como los de antes y un mostrador para venta de quesos y embutidos muy bueno, falta espacio con sombra y en la confiteria seria muy bueno que habilitarán un sector al aire libre aprovechando el amplio espacio que tienen

(Translated by Google)
The pleasant service they generally have at all the ACA stations, the classic cafeteria with waiters like the ones before and a counter for selling cheeses and sausages is very good. There is a lack of shaded space and in the cafeteria it would be very good if they enabled an open-air area taking advantage of the ample space they have.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCM09HS1NBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena confiteria,no muy lleno ya que al quedar abajo del puente,le sacó el "paso de ruta".Para entendidos.

(Translated by Google)
Good confectionery shop, not very crowded since it's located below the bridge, which takes away its "highway access". For connoisseurs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCM0xxX3JRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un clásico parador de la ruta 2. Tiene kiosco, cafetería, sandwichs,buena repostería y restaurante. Buena atención. Precios normales, descuento para socios del ACA. Hay un buen estacionamiento.

(Translated by Google)
A classic rest stop on Route 2. It has a kiosk, coffee shop, sandwiches, good pastries, and a restaurant. Good service. Normal prices, discount for ACA members. There's ample parking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCM0l5TkxnEAE

reviews.comment:
Chiquito, no esperen la típica estación grande y cómoda cuando uno va de viaje, esta es más para ir al baño y salir de nuevo.

No venden sanguches ni nada para comer, solo masitas.  Sus Heladeras están casi vacías.

Tienen agua caliente para el mate.

(Translated by Google)
Chiquito, don't expect the typical large and comfortable station when you're traveling; this one is more for going to the bathroom and leaving again.

They don't sell sandwiches or anything to eat, just pastries. Their refrigerators are almost empty.

They have hot water for mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCdUpMbG1RRRAB
